items.title: Premier League preseason friendlies 2026-27: Fixtures, UK kick-off times and summer tour schedule
items.summary: Premier League clubs have confirmed their preseason schedules ahead of the new campaign, with the 2026-27 season kicking off on Aug. 21.

items.title: Premier League 2026 summer transfers: All confirmed ins, outs for every club
items.summary: Here's every Premier League in and out before the 2026-27 season begins.

items.title: World Cup breakout star Johan Manzambi joins Aston Villa
items.summary: World Cup breakout star Johan Manzambi joined Champions League-bound Aston Villa on Friday in a record transfer deal for a Swiss player.

items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Porro's World Cup for Spain catches Barça's eye
items.summary: The Pedro Porro-Lamine Yamal partnership has been a boon for Spain at this World Cup, and Barça want to reunite the pair. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Man United vs. Wrexham: Andrey Santos in travelling squad, Benjamin Sesko absent
items.summary: Andrey Santos could get his first run-out in Manchester United colours on Saturday after being included in the travelling squad for their pre-season friendly against Wrexham in Helsinki.

items.title: Dominik Szoboszlai commits Liverpool future with new long-term contract
items.summary: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai has signed a new long-term contract at Anfield.
